title: AstikorCarts
description:
Original AstikorCarts reuploaded for Modrinth. No further changes were made, as the mod is no longer being maintained.

This mod adds carts that can be pulled by ridden entities and/or the player.
body:
**NO LONGER MAINTAINED**

This is a reuploaded version to allow for creating modpacks using Modrinth. For newer Versions, check out [AstikorCarts Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/astikorcarts-redux) (NeoForge) and [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts) (Fabric)

## **Carts and cart specific controls:**

### Supply Cart

![A wooden cart with items and blocks displayed on the back.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6c1168bb48a4da029830292f4ae3e9b0759c176.gif)

This cart is the oldest of this mod. It comes with a double chest inventory and has room for a friend of yours to sit comfortably on its back. Good luck on the adventures you shall overcome together.

_Controls:
The carts inventory can be accessed by sneaking while right clicking it. If you right click it without sneaking, you will start riding the cart instead._

### Plow

![A wooden plow with minecraft tools attached.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e56a6022ae274cb7bb713ad157032e9031c16fc5.gif)

The plow is a useful cart and has been slightly repurposed in v0.1.2.0. Not only can you put hoes in its inventory slots to till up to 3 blocks at once, but also shovels to turn dirt into a path for connecting interesting places within your world.

_Controls:
The plowing mode can be toggled by right clicking it. Just like the cart, it's inventory can be accessed by sneaking while right clicking it._

### Animal Cart

![A wooden cart with animals on the back.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd43402b8842303d1c65493b2af3f290c8c7009.gif)

This cart is a boat on wheels. Use it to allow both your human and non-human friends to travel alongside you without sweating.

_Controls:
You can push entities into the cart to take them along with you and release them by right clicking the cart while sneaking. Right click it while not sneaking and you will start riding the cart yourse_
